schema.name: pull_request_merge_rate
schema.description: 3-month trailing average of the monthly PR merge rate per repo.

fields.name: month
fields.description: First day of the month in which PRs were resolved (YYYY-MM-DD)

fields.name: pr_merge_rate
fields.description: 3-month trailing average of the fraction of PRs resolved in this month that were merged (vs. closed without merge) [0, 1]
